headline: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed
summary: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.

raw.headline: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed

headline: Why Firefly Aerospace (FLY) Is Up 38.9% After Rapid VICTUS DIEM Launch Simulation Success
summary: In March 2026, Firefly Aerospace supported Lockheed Martin and the U.S. Space Force’s VICTUS DIEM mission, helping complete a rapid payload processing exercise in under 12 hours and a full responsive launch simulation within 36 hours, alongside partners Space Safari and Space Launch Delta 30. This rapid-turnaround work reinforces Firefly’s role in tactically responsive space and defense missions, complementing its growing backlog and high-margin software contracts such as the US$372 million...

headline: 'Anything but autos': Can defense save Europe’s ailing car industry?
summary: The transition from wheels to weapons is achievable in part because many of the underlying skills are highly transferable, according to experts.

raw.headline: 'Anything but autos': Can defense save Europe’s ailing car industry?
raw.summary: The transition from wheels to weapons is achievable in part because many of the underlying skills are highly transferable, according to experts.

headline: Pete Buttigieg Criticizes Trump Budget For Prioritizing Foreign Wars Over Domestic Needs, 'Making Life In America Even More Unaffordable'
summary: Pete Buttigieg slams Trump's $500 Billion war budget, warns Americans face $3,700 per household while health, housing and education face cuts.
